Okay, so when you're creating your free plus shipping thing, there's usually two core um I mean, well, I guess I guess I almost say there's three cool There's three ways to do it. Number one is just making something that's really really cool, right a knife or a t-shirt or Um playing cards or you know something that's just super super cool That doesn't really have anything to do with your back end products. It's just it's just cool. Okay, that's one That's one type of buyer magnet you can create. Okay. The second type is your is your what? Okay? It's the overview of what it is you're teaching. Okay, so for example back in the day We had a training course called micro continuity and the back in here We're teaching people how to make a micro continuity site. Okay, we were giving them the how-to Okay, the product they were buying was a how-to But we gave them a free it was an mp3 player a free mp3 player that had a bunch of audios where I was explaining what micro continuity was That makes sense. That's why I says what down here. I'm explaining what it is. Okay, so for example I could Steve and we may decide to go this direction with Steve. I'm not sure yet So we kind of dig deeper into it but with Steve. He's in the forex niche his free CD might be an overview of his forex system Okay, here's my forex system the first thing you do is this second thing you do is this third thing you do is this In an hour he's going to give an overview of what his system is. Okay, that is a what type of buyer magnet Okay, so that's what you're teaching overview And then the the product is the how-to where you're actually breaking down you're showing someone how to do what you just showed Him over here. So here's I'm showing you here's the micro continuity site. Here's a forex system Here's a weight loss system and over here you're teaching Let me show you how to do it You break it down and you get into a lot more detail and you just you give a lot more because you have a lot more time And and uh and space to dig a lot deeper into it. Okay So that's that's what I'm looking for is usually the what your system is or the second thing it can be is the secret Okay, now the secret is I look back and I find like what's what's of my entire system Is there one thing that's so Prolific and so different and so unique that if I told somebody about that it would blow their mind They'd be like wow that is awesome. Okay, for example, if you look at um If you look at dot com secrets labs dot com secrets labs is not a system I'm not teaching somebody how to to do ab split testing or teaching how to start a business I'm just showing them some one cool thing which are my split test results Okay, I'm pulling out one secret. Do you want the results of my secret split tests? Boom here it is Okay, do you guys see that so When you're designing this you got to pick which one you want to do like I said I want to I want you guys get to get good at creating multiple of these because a lot of times in most businesses You're gonna have multiple front ends. Okay, but right now I want to pick one obviously But you need to decide is yours is going to be like a what like what my system is Or am I going to be able to have one secret like pull out and I just focus my entire front end on that Okay, and both of them work really really good the fun thing with this secret especially if it's something that That's unique or something that people don't know about It can be really really powerful, but the key is you have to be you have to be very prolific um, I've seen people who've attempted this and um And I saw some in the weight loss space actually attempt this and they went and their whole um You know their their big secret was You should drink water before you eat each meal that was it and they charged people to learn the secret people got it It's like hey, this is the big secret before you get any meals You drink two cups of water if you do that you're gonna be more hydrated and your stomach will be full and you're not gonna get as much get as much You're not gonna Be as hungry while you're eating and you lose weight. Okay, now while that's true and um, You know, it's it's can be interesting. I guess it's not really prolific It's kind of saying hey, this is the big secret to weight loss. You've got to eat less calories Then you work off Okay, like yeah, that's true, but it's not like the secret prolific thing You want something that when someone listens to it they get like that aha moment where they're like Wow, that is really really cool.
